case.title: NATIONAL CAPITAL AIRLINES INC. v. CIVIL AERONAUTICS BOARD

opinion.h: NATIONAL CAPITAL AIRLINES INC. v. CIVIL AERONAUTICS BOARD , 398 U.S. 908 (1970)
NATIONAL CAPITAL AIRLINES, INC., petitioner, v. CIVIL AERONAUTICS BOARD et al. No. 1361.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit.
Mr. Justice DOUGLAS took no part in the consideration of decison of this petition.[ National Capital Airlines Inc. v. Civil Aeronautics Board 398 U.S. 908 (1970) ]
